Get plot display metadata for a value variable

Source: R/utils.R
dot-get_plot_meta.Rd

Internal helper that returns display metadata for a given value variable, including the plot title, y-axis caption, reference line value, and variable type classification. Used across plot functions to avoid repeating switch and if blocks for each variable type.

Usage

.get_plot_meta(metric, amount_divisor = 1e+08)

Arguments

metric

A single character string naming the variable to plot. Must be one of the recognised variable names in the lossratio package.

amount_divisor

Numeric scaling factor for amount variables. Default is 1e8.

Value

A named list with elements:

type

One of "ratio", "amount", or "prop".

title

Plot title string.

caption

Y-axis caption string, or NULL.

hline

Y-intercept for a reference line, or NULL.
